label: RSI Threshold
audit_notes: Useful for oversold/overbought hypotheses; must be checked per symbol and regime.

label: EMA Trend Filter
description: Price or context market above/below EMA.
audit_notes: Good for BTC context or local symbol trend alignment.

label: MACD Cross
audit_notes: Event-based block; requires chronological replay to avoid look-ahead.

label: VWAP Position
audit_notes: Useful for intraday structure; session reset rules should be explicit.

label: ATR Risk Filter
audit_notes: Prevents testing formulas only during unusable volatility.

label: Relative Volume
description: Current volume compared with rolling average.
audit_notes: Useful as liquidity/attention confirmation; weak on illiquid assets.

label: Bollinger Band Position
audit_notes: Research-only block for mean reversion/volatility hypotheses.

label: Score Threshold Simulator
description: Compare formula performance across score thresholds.
audit_notes: Simulator only; does not activate signals.

label: Funding/OI Context Placeholder
description: Optional derivatives context from user-provided APIs.
audit_notes: Future research input; not computed in current audits.
